lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Ah, you again. Do you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to talk about your cape again.

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: What about it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I buy another one?

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Aye, but a cape like this doesn't come for free. It will cost you 99,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A small price to pay for such a fantastic cape.

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Treat it well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Do I know you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think so.

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Then I will have to ask you to move on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But...

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Here's a word of advice: Don't take things personally. I get a lot of wannabes bothering me and wanting to join my crew, but I'm not here to offer out cheap thrills.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what are you here for?

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: To enjoy a drink and not be bothered. Now, if you'll excuse me...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about your cape?

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Fine. This cape marks me as someone who has mastered the art of sailing. Only those who are skilled enough and brave enough to face anything the seas throw at them are allowed to wear one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So could I have one?

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: No. Now, if you'll excuse me...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Hmm... I've heard about you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You have?

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Aye. Apparently you're someone who mostly knows what they're doing when it comes to sailing. I find it's a rarity these days.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about your cape?

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: This cape marks me as someone who has mastered the art of sailing. Only those who are skilled enough and brave enough to face anything the seas throw at them are allowed to wear one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So could I have one?

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Aye, you've earned that right. Unlike most of the rabble around here, you've actually put in the work to master the seas. However, a cape like this doesn't come for free. It will cost you 99,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A small price to pay for such a fantastic cape.

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Treat it well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, I've changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Brass Hand Harry
lines.text: Suit yourself. The offer still stands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd best be off.
